remember: Students will be able to recall and list the different types of biomechanics in sports.
Students will be able to describe the importance of biomechanics in sports performance.
Students will be able to identify and explain the different factors affecting biomechanics in sports.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of biomechanics and its application in sports.
Students will be able to describe the relationship between biomechanics and sports performance.
Students will be able to analyze the role of biomechanics in preventing sports injuries.
apply: Students will be able to apply biomechanical principles to improve sports performance.
Students will be able to design and implement a biomechanics-based training program.
Students will be able to analyze and correct biomechanical faults in sports techniques.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the biomechanical demands of different sports and activities.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of biomechanics-based training programs.
Students will be able to identify and recommend biomechanical changes to improve sports performance.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of biomechanics and its importance in sports.
Describe the different types of biomechanics in sports and their applications.
Analyze the factors affecting biomechanics in sports and their impact on performance.
board_exam_objectives: Define biomechanics and its role in sports performance.
Explain the biomechanical demands of different sports and activities.
Describe the importance of biomechanics in preventing sports injuries.
